case_title: ISMAEL J. STULZER VS. DAMIAN GARCIA et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,400.00 FILED BY STULZER, ISMAEL J. AS TO DEFENDANT GARCIA, DAMIAN COMANDAO, MARIE KARL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-28-2010 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED SEP-21-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GARCIA, DAMIAN

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-28-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-28-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANTS. CO-DEFENDANT MARIE KARL COMANDAO WAIVES SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER MARTA RIESEN PRESENT ON PLAINTIFF'S BEHALF. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-28-2010 - JUDGMENT.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STULZER, ISMAEL J. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT GARCIA, DAMIAN COMANDAO, MARIE KARL STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2011 ORDERED DESTROYED
